summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Luexe Digital premium landing page completed. All 14 features in the test request are functioning correctly across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Loader counter animates 0→100%, 3D hero canvas lazy-loads, all sections render with expected card counts, Lenis-driven nav anchor scroll works, stats counters animate without negative flashes, mobile hamburger menu opens correctly, no horizontal overflow, no console/page errors, no 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay.

navbar.anchor_scroll_works: all 4 nav links scroll the matching section into view via Lenis

stats.notes: Sampled ~70 frames during animation; CountUp clamp [0,1] working — no negative flashes observed.

critical_code_review_comments: Stats.jsx CountUp clamp `Math.min(1, Math.max(0, ...))` is correctly preventing negative-value flashes — verified via 70-frame sampling.
Hero canvas is lazy-loaded — initial screenshot may show it absent if asserted too early. Tests should wait ~1-2s after loader detach before asserting on canvas.
Lenis instance is exposed on window (window.__lenis) which is great for testability; recommend keeping this pattern.
All key elements have data-testid attributes — excellent test hygiene.
Footer renders correctly but data-testid is 'footer'; consider 'footer-section' for naming consistency with other sections. (Non-blocking, optional.)
test_credentials: Not applicable — static landing page, no auth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 features in the original test request are passing. Test was performed against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://adaptive-premium.preview.emergentagent.com. Use window.__lenis.scrollTo(el) for programmatic scrolling because Lenis intercepts native scroll. Wait for [data-testid=loader-screen] to detach (timeout 10-15s) before interacting. Hero 3D canvas is lazy-loaded; allow ~2s after loader detach before asserting. Stats CountUp is in-view triggered; scroll stats-section into view to trigger animation.
